content:
Hello there, discord rain here, back at it again for another beginner comp. Not a speedrun comp this time, because poison is slow as always, but should be able to get you through story.

Note that this comp is not the best poison comp out there (Also poison is just not that great in general atm), but is definitely something you can try if you really like xu but doesn't have any of the limited poison supports.

As always, attached is my Hard Mode Mother tree clear with standard banner wheels and the GOAT R wheels. Thanks Discord Cheri for the Faros tech suggestion, she also did a clear of hm 7-12 with only standard unit, replacing Xu with Sanga. Now onto the actual guide.
thread_title: Beginner Poison Comp Guide ft. Xu
